text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As I'm passing through the school gates...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
It's the head of the disciplinary committee,
Bamboo Memory! I wonder if she's doing rounds?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
She almost looks... sinister. I bet she's a real
stickler when it comes to school rule violations
and stuff...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Oh, greetings! You're one of the school
trainers, right?
choice_data_list: Hey. Are you out here doing rounds?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Nope! Recently, there've been reports of a
suspicious woman in a white coat and mask
running around campus, so I'm on the lookout!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
No prob! Just doing my duty as a member of the
disciplinary committee!

text_block_list.name: Disciplinary Committee Member
text_block_list.text: Urgent news, Bamboo!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: What is it?!

text_block_list.name: Disciplinary Committee Member
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship started practicing a giant swing
wrestling move in the central plaza all of a
sudden...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: That Golshi! She's always causing a ruckus!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, it'll be trouble if she makes herself dizzy,
falls over, and hurts herself...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I shall stop her at once!
choice_data_list: You've got your work cut out for you, huh?
You've got your work cut out for you, huh?
You'd better hurry to the scene of the crime!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I shall stop her at once!
choice_data_list: You've got your work cut out for you, huh?
You've got your work cut out for you, huh?
You'd better hurry to the scene of the crime!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: No worries! This is nothing, really!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, it's a good thing when people start
causing trouble because it means they're in good
spirits!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I just need to keep an eye out and make sure they
don't do anything totally off the charts. Rest
assured—I've got this.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Well, some trouble still catches me off guard, but
it also adds some zest into my life. Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory has a big smile on her face as
she runs off.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Roger that! If I make a straight dash toward the
plaza, I'll get there in no time!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
If it's not too much trouble, could you watch over
this area for me?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Whoa, thanks! I owe you big time!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All right, time to earn my keep as the
no-nonsense leader of the disciplinary committee
and get things under control!

text_block_list.name: Disciplinary Committee Member
text_block_list.text: Bamboo! Wait for me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory sprints off, leaving the other
committee member frantically chasing after her.
